description: Rare hybrid beasts and magical creatures — chimeras, petrifiers, and other wonders of the wild.
creatures: Pseudodragon
A cat-sized dragon that purrs, stings with its tail, and speaks directly into your mind.
Hippogriff
An eagle-headed steed with powerful wings and a haughty temper that must be earned, not broken.
Owlbear
A hulking, feathered beast with an owl's swiveling head and a bear's crushing embrace.
Peryton
A stag-headed bird that casts a humanoid shadow and tears out hearts to feed its young.
Cockatrice
A rooster-headed lizard whose venomous bite turns warm flesh to cold stone.
Basilisk
An eight-legged reptile whose baleful, glowing eyes turn living creatures to stone on contact.
Medusa
A snake-haired woman whose direct gaze petrifies, surrounded by the statues of those who looked.
Lamia
A lion-bodied temptress with a human torso who lures victims close with honeyed words.
Chimera
A three-headed nightmare — lion fangs, goat horns, dragon fire — all sharing one furious body.
Wyvern
A two-legged dragon with a venomous barbed tail that dives from cliff nests to snatch livestock.
Drake
A wingless, muscular dragon that hunts in packs and breathes elemental fury.
Behir
A twelve-legged serpent that crackles with lightning and swallows prey whole.
Bulette
A land shark that tunnels beneath the surface and explodes upward under its prey's feet.
Gorgon
A metallic bull whose poisonous breath turns flesh and bone to cold stone.
Manticore
A human-faced lion with bat wings and a scorpion tail that flings volleys of iron spikes.
